name: ui-x-dropzone
title: Dropzone
author: Kwan Jun Wen
description: Provides an accessible file input with drag states, validation states, keyboard activation, and accepted-file output.

changes: Changed UI-X internal and cn aliases to copied source-local imports.
Disabled the color transition when reduced motion is requested.
Set the optional trigger to type=button so it cannot submit a parent form.

modifications.change: Changed UI-X internal and cn aliases to copied source-local imports. Disabled the color transition when reduced motion is requested.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component source-local and safe in forms while preserving upstream behavior.

modifications.change: Set the optional trigger to type=button so it cannot submit a parent form.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component source-local and safe in forms while preserving upstream behavior.
